item.title: Bringing This Old Dozer Back to Life
item.description: Laura Farms works to bring an old dozer back to life, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and the care it takes to keep equipment going.

media:content.media:title: Bringing This Old Dozer Back to Life
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms works to bring an old dozer back to life, sharing a hands-on look at farm machinery and the care it takes to keep equipment going.

item.title: The Real Price of Farming
item.description: Laura Farms shares a straightforward look at the real price of farming and the work behind every crop.

media:content.media:title: The Real Price of Farming
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a straightforward look at the real price of farming and the work behind every crop.

item.title: A Small Combine Hiccup on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a day when the combine hit a little hiccup, showing the real ups and downs of farm work and the teamwork it takes to keep going.

media:content.media:title: A Small Combine Hiccup on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a day when the combine hit a little hiccup, showing the real ups and downs of farm work and the teamwork it takes to keep going.

item.title: Starting Up the Old John Deere
item.description: Laura Farms shares the first startup of the old John Deere, a simple farm moment that highlights hands-on work and the value of keeping machinery going.

media:content.media:title: Starting Up the Old John Deere
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the first startup of the old John Deere, a simple farm moment that highlights hands-on work and the value of keeping machinery going.

item.title: Preparing the Land for Success
item.description: Laura Farms gets the land ready for a strong season ahead, showing the steady work and care that go into farm life.

media:content.media:title: Preparing the Land for Success
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms gets the land ready for a strong season ahead, showing the steady work and care that go into farm life.

item.title: Transforming a John Deere 4020
item.description: Laura Farms transforms a John Deere 4020, showing hands-on tractor work and the kind of farm know-how that keeps daily jobs moving.

item.title: Servicing the 16-Row John Deere Planter
item.description: Laura Farms services the 16-row John Deere planter, keeping equipment ready for planting season.

item.title: Mowing the Lawn With 3 Tractors
item.description: Laura Farms takes on lawn mowing with three tractors, showing the kind of hands-on farm work and teamwork that keeps rural life moving.

item.description: Laura Farms gets the big machines ready for the field, keeping the work moving and the farm day on track.

item.title: Why Auto-Steer Isn’t Always Helpful
item.description: Laura Farms shows a real farm moment where auto-steer doesn’t always make the job easier.

item.title: Laura Farms Mows the Lawn Fast
item.description: Laura Farms gets the lawn mowed fast in a simple day on the farm. A quick, relatable look at keeping up with daily chores.

item.title: Installing the Dual Wheel Mounts
item.description: Laura Farms installs the dual wheel mounts, keeping the work moving on the farm with a practical, hands-on approach.
